title: ANX-Bench Behavioral Response Row Schema
description: Canonical validation schema for one respondent's revealed-preference behavioral validation task response. Each row records the randomized high-impact AI decision arm, allocation of a 100-cent review budget between AI-only review and human review, task comprehension, exclusion flags, and the derived revealed anxiety criterion score.

wave_id.description: Stable wave identifier with study family, country or population code, calendar year, wave number, and optional qualifier.

respondent_id.description: Study-scoped salted pseudonymous respondent identifier. This must match the analytic respondent identifier used for wave response linkage and must not be a raw vendor ID.

task_id.description: Stable identifier for the standardized behavioral validation task.

benchmark_version.description: Semantic ANX-Bench release version governing the administered task and scoring rules.

randomized_arm.description: Randomly assigned high-impact AI decision scenario arm shown before the allocation choice.

allocation_mode.description: Whether the allocation affected a real bonus or was stated as a research allocation that may not affect compensation.

ai_only_review_cents.description: Number of cents allocated to AI-only review. Must be an integer from 0 to 100 when observed.

human_review_cents.description: Number of cents allocated to human review. Must be an integer from 0 to 100 when observed.

allocation_total_cents.description: Total cents allocated across AI-only review and human review. Valid observed rows must equal 100.

allocation_confirmed.description: True only when the respondent actively submitted or confirmed the allocation under the wave's interface rules.

behavioral_comprehension_response.description: Response to the required behavioral task comprehension check. Option 1 is the correct response.

behavioral_comprehension_passed.description: True only when behavioral_comprehension_response equals 1. Null only when the comprehension check was not administered or not captured.

exclusion_flags.description: Machine-readable reasons this behavioral row or respondent is excluded from one or more behavioral criterion-validity analyses. Empty array means no exclusion flag has been applied.

missingness_code.description: Reason the revealed anxiety score is present or absent. Observed means the allocation and comprehension data are valid for scoring unless exclusion flags remove the row from a specific analysis.

revealed_anxiety_score.description: Derived criterion score equal to human_review_cents divided by 100. Higher values indicate greater revealed preference for human review over AI-only review.
